---
title: "ETC5513 Assignment 1"
author: "Shixu Xiao"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
